name: Tone violations with rule citations
prompt: Review this 5to grado text for style compliance: 'Debes memorizar las tablas de multiplicar. Si no lo haces, vas a reprobar. Es muy facil, cualquier nino puede hacerlo. Los alumnos deben abrir su libro en la pagina 15.' Produce the style changelog.
expected_behavior: Flags 'Debes memorizar' as CRITICAL tone violation (VOZ-04: imperative commanding)
Flags 'vas a reprobar' as CRITICAL tone violation (VOZ-07: negative framing/threat)
Flags 'Es muy facil' as CRITICAL tone violation (VOZ-06: condescending)
Flags 'Los alumnos' as CRITICAL inclusivity violation (INC-01: gendered default)
Provides corrected alternatives for each violation
Every correction cites a specific rule ID

name: Ortotipographic convention enforcement
prompt: Review this text for ortotipographic compliance: 'En la pagina 5, hay 3 ejercicios. El estudiante debe usar "comillas rectas" para citas. los titulos van en minuscula. IMPORTANTE: no olvidar el punto final' Apply Manual de Voz ortotipographic rules.
expected_behavior: Flags number formatting: '3 ejercicios' should be 'tres ejercicios' (ORT-01: spell out 1-10)
Flags quotation marks: should use angular quotes instead of straight quotes (ORT-12)
Flags lowercase heading start: 'los titulos' needs capitalization (ORT-05)
Flags 'IMPORTANTE' full caps as non-standard emphasis (ORT-08)
Produces changelog with all corrections and rule citations

name: Grade-inappropriate vocabulary detection
prompt: Review vocabulary appropriateness for 5to grado (age 9-10): 'La epistemologia nos ayuda a comprender el paradigma hermeneutico de la interpretacion textual. El feedback del docente es crucial para el scaffolding metacognitivo.' Generate corrections with rule citations.
expected_behavior: Flags 'epistemologia' as WARNING: grade-inappropriate for 5to grado (VOC-07)
Flags 'paradigma hermeneutico' as WARNING: unexplained jargon (VOC-01)
Flags 'scaffolding metacognitivo' as WARNING: unexplained jargon + anglicism (VOC-01, VOC-05)
Provides grade-appropriate alternatives for each term
Notes that the entire passage exceeds vocabulary complexity for target grade
